pages.text: $(item:magic_storage:storage_unit_t1) expand your network's capacity for storing $(thing)different item types$(). Each Unit contributes type slots based on its tier.

Storage Units do $(thing)not$() limit item quantity - they only limit how many $(thing)different types$() of items you can store. Once a type is registered, you can store unlimited amounts of that item.$(br2)Items with different $(thing)NBT data$() (damage, enchantments, etc.) count as separate types.

When a Storage Unit is broken, it drops itself at the same tier. The network's available type capacity decreases immediately, but stored items stay in the Core and are not deleted.$(br2)Add enough Units before inserting any new item types.
